Use cards for scanability on iPhone: one primary number, status pill, and 2–3 details.
Use baseline/range visualization for HRV and RHR because personal baseline matters more than population comparison.
Use progress bars for readiness, sleep score, Body Battery, stress, steps, intensity minutes, training load, and nutrition.

Source fields include training readiness, HRV baseline, sleep score/duration/stages/need, Body Battery wake/current/high/charge/drain, stress average/max/rest split, steps/distance/active calories, weekly intensity minutes, acute load/ACWR, VO₂ max, nutrition calories/protein/water, resting HR vs 7-day average, SpO₂, and respiration.
